hero.name: Uihyun Jung
hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.description: A frontend developer who prioritizes user experience above all. With over 10 years of web development experience, I build modern web applications with a focus on performance and accessibility.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio: From building frontend for online gaming platforms to diverse web services, I've gained extensive experience across the stack. I specialize in designing user-centric interfaces with React, Next.js, and TypeScript, with a deep interest in performance optimization and accessibility.

doubledown.description: Online gaming platform lobby frontend development. Building large-scale SPA with Next.js, React, TypeScript and supporting 11 languages.

darum.description: UI development and publishing for various web services. Responsive web implementation, cross-browser compatibility, and web accessibility compliance.

hexafactory.description: Web publishing and planning. Service UI/UX design and frontend implementation.

itline.description: Web service planning and project management.

lobbyV2.title: Gaming Platform Lobby Frontend v2
lobbyV2.description: Next-gen lobby system for a global online gaming platform. A re-architecture project that resolved v1's technical debt while dramatically improving performance, scalability, and test coverage.

highlights.h1: Designed state management architecture with Jotai + TanStack Query, separating server/client state with cache optimization
highlights.h2: Built 11-language i18n pipeline with next-intl, including runtime translation-miss detection system
highlights.h3: Implemented real-time game state sync via WebSocket with automatic reconnection logic
highlights.h4: Established Playwright E2E + Vitest unit testing framework, integrated automated tests into CI pipeline

lobbyV1.title: Gaming Platform Lobby Frontend v1
lobbyV1.description: Built the initial frontend for an online gaming platform lobby from scratch. Designed and operated the platform's core infrastructure including i18n, authentication, and real-time communication.

highlights.h1: Designed global state management and server data fetching architecture using Recoil + SWR
highlights.h2: Implemented auth/authorization flow with next-auth, including session management and security middleware
highlights.h3: Built 10-language i18n system with region-specific content branching logic

publishing.title: Large-Scale Web Publishing Projects
publishing.description: Published websites and service UIs for diverse enterprises and organizations over 6 years. Delivered dozens of projects with responsive design, cross-browser compatibility, and WCAG accessibility as core principles.

highlights.h1: Designed semantic markup and SCSS-based component style architecture, built reusable UI pattern library
highlights.h2: Cross-browser support from IE11 to modern browsers, responsive layouts for mobile, tablet, and desktop
highlights.h3: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility validation

noopdaaBlog.title: Noopdaa Blog
noopdaaBlog.description: Full-stack blog platform built on Turborepo monorepo. Separated public blog and admin dashboard as independent apps, ensuring type safety and code reusability through shared packages.

highlights.h1: Turborepo monorepo architecture — blog app / admin dashboard / shared packages (DB, UI, Config)
highlights.h2: Designed security model with Supabase RLS policies, auto view-count aggregation and profile creation via DB triggers
highlights.h3: Built visitor analytics dashboard — device, browser, referrer tracking with Recharts visualization

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Interested in new opportunities or collaboration? Feel free to reach out.
